message:
test(proptest): add 119 property-based tests for search module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New proptest coverage for the entire search subsystem:
- proptest_hash_embedder (32 tests): output length, determinism, L2 norm,
  case insensitivity, empty/short text, batch vs individual, value range
- proptest_vector_index (39 tests): FTVI write+read roundtrip with f16
  tolerance, magic bytes, count/dimension preservation, search ordering
- proptest_hybrid_search (48 tests): RRF fusion sorted/unique invariants,
  two-tier blending deduplication, Kendall's tau range/symmetry/identity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
